title: Mo Waystones
description: Adds new waystone varients to the Waystones Mod
body:
This mod adds custom varients to the waystones mod created by [BlayTheNinth](https://modrinth.com/user/BlayTheNinth). These waystones can be crafted by using one warpstone from the waystone mod, three obsidian, and three blocks and/or items corresponding to the waystone type. 

These waystones can be used to travel to each other and even have compatability with waystones from the original mod.

This mod requires the [Waystones Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) and all of it's required mods in order to function.

These are the current waystones added by the mod with many plans to add more:
![These are the current waystones added by the mod with many plans to add more](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0dc176a003248aff055f7b0bc91212b614c4f64.png)

You can join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/DfPajwxua5) in order to submit waystone ideas.
